name: Google Photos
description: Photo and video sharing and storage service from Google with AI-powered search and editing.

years.notes: Original launch mark introduced May 28, 2015. Four-blade pinwheel with red/blue/yellow/green tactile facets and a central white camera-flash star. The raw Adobe Illustrator export embedded base64 PNG overlays for soft shading; those rasters and the low-opacity decorative overlays were dropped during cleanup, keeping the four main blade paths, their darker fold triangles, and the white center star. Redrawn to a 24x24 viewBox via translate(0 0.42) scale(0.0046388) over the native 5173.818x4990.8 source.

June 2020 redesign aligned with the Google Workspace icon family. Flat pinwheel made of four solid semicircles in Google's official red/blue/yellow/green, no shading, no central star. Redrawn to a 24x24 viewBox via scale(0.40678) over the native 59x59 source.

Late 2025 gradient redesign rolled out in Google Photos v7.55. Same four-semicircle pinwheel shape as 2020 but each blade is now a radial gradient that lightens toward the center, matching the AI-era Google G / Gemini visual language. Redrawn to a 24x24 viewBox via scale(0.068571) over the native 350x350 source; gradients preserved verbatim using userSpaceOnUse so they scale with the wrapper transform.
